stage_1_retrieval.notes: PubMed-only search reproduced 7/7 included primary studies; original paper searched 4 databases and identified 652 records.

stage_2_abstract_screening.notes: 100% sensitivity; 23 false positives retained as acceptable over-inclusion at abstract stage per SLR best practice.

stage_3_fulltext_assessment.notes: All 5 remaining false positives were post-hoc analyses of true-positive trials - a characterized failure mode.

stage_4_deduplication.notes: Batched classification of all candidates enables cross-paper detection of secondary publications.
